todos.details: Create useLocations, useLocation, useCreateLocation, useUpdateLocation, useDeleteLocation hooks following the holidays hook pattern. GET /locations accepts ?active param. All mutations invalidate ['/locations'].

Add 'locations' namespace with key groups: page.*, table.*, form.*, detail.*, delete.*, empty.*. Cover column headers (Code, Name, City, Country, Timezone, Active), form labels, placeholders, delete confirmation text, and empty state. Mirror in de.json.
Create a loading skeleton matching the data table layout. Follow the existing skeleton pattern from holidays.
Confirmation dialog showing "Delete location '{name}' ({code})?". Calls useDeleteLocation on confirm. Accepts open, onOpenChange, location, and onSuccess props.

Table with columns: Code, Name, City, Country, Timezone, Active (badge), Actions. Row click opens detail sheet. Actions dropdown: Edit, Delete. Sortable by code and name. Search filters by code, name, or city. Active filter toggle.

Sheet with fields: Code (text, required, max 20), Name (text, required, max 255), Description (textarea), Address, City, Country, Timezone (searchable select with IANA names grouped by region), Active (switch, edit only). Handle 409 with inline code error.

Build a searchable select dropdown for IANA timezones grouped by region (e.g., Europe, America, Asia). Show UTC offset next to each entry. This can be inline in the form sheet or extracted as a sub-component.

Read-only sheet showing code, name, description, full address, timezone with current UTC offset (e.g. 'Europe/Berlin (UTC+1)'), active status, created_at and updated_at. Edit and Delete action buttons.

todos.text: Create barrel export and page component
todos.details: Create index.ts barrel export for all location components. Create page.tsx managing state for create/edit/view/delete dialogs, search, and active filter. Wire all components together following holidays page pattern.

todos.text: Add sidebar nav entry and breadcrumb segment
todos.details: Add locations entry under 'Management' section: { titleKey: 'nav.locations', href: '/admin/locations', icon: MapPin, roles: ['admin'] }. Add 'locations' to breadcrumb segmentToKey mapping.
Add 'nav.locations' key to sidebar translations in both en.json and de.json (e.g., 'Locations' / 'Standorte').
Run dev server, navigate to /admin/locations. Verify: empty state shows, create a location with timezone, check list/detail, edit address, handle duplicate code 409, delete with confirmation.
